title: fix: build endpoint for compat API

comments.body:
@matejvasek: GitHub didn't allow me to request PR reviews from the following users: riyad.

Note that only [containers members](https://github.com/orgs/containers/people) and repo collaborators can review this PR, and authors cannot review their own PRs.

<details>

In response to [this](https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/9790#issuecomment-805008077):

>/cc @riyad @jwhonce 


Instructions for interacting with me using PR comments are available [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/pull-requests.md).  If you have questions or suggestions related to my behavior, please file an issue against the [kubernetes/test-infra](https://github.com/kubernetes/test-infra/issues/new?title=Prow%20issue:) repository.
</details>
I have a similar PR, but have not been able to get back to this.  Some of this code is in the master branch of Buildah, now I believe.
Changes LGTM, but I'm not sure if we should go with this or @rhatdan's WIP?

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *matejvasek*, *rhatdan* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [rhatdan] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
